sqlMap.select: select count(*) as existe from ALL_TABLES where TABLE_NAME = upper(#idtabla#)
sqlMap.update: create table $tablename$ ( ID $NUMBER_TYPE$, IDCARGA $NUMBER_TYPE$, IDELEMENTOCARGA $NUMBER_TYPE$, ESTADO $CHAR_TYPE$(1), NREG $NUMBER_TYPE$)
alter table $tablename$ add constraint pk_$tablename$ primary key (ID)
create table $tablename$ ( ID $tipocampo$, NOMBRE $VARCHAR2_TYPE$(4000), COLORLETRA $VARCHAR2_TYPE$(500), COLORFONDO $VARCHAR2_TYPE$(500), ESTADO $VARCHAR2_TYPE$(1) )
alter table $tablename$ add constraint pk_$tablename$ primary key (ID)
sqlMap.select: select count(*) as existe from ALL_TAB_COLUMNS where TABLE_NAME = upper(#idTabla#) and COLUMN_NAME = upper(#idCampo#)
sqlMap.update: alter table $tablename$ add $id_campo$ $tipo$
alter table $tablename$ $MODIFY$ $id_campo$ $SET$ $tipo$
alter table $tablename$ $MODIFY$ $id_campo$ $SET$ not null
alter table $tablename$ $MODIFY$ $id_campo$ $SET_NULL$
alter table $tablename$ add constraint UK_$id_campo$ unique ($id_campo$, idcarga)
alter table $tablaRel$ add constraint UK_ID_V unique (ID_V, idcarga)
alter table $tablename$ drop constraint UK_$id_campo$ cascade
alter table $tablename$ drop column $id_campo$
alter table $tablename$ add constraint FK_$tablename$$id_campo$ foreign key ($id_campo$) references $llave_foranea$ (ID)
create table $tablaRel$ ( id $NUMBER_TYPE$, id_p $NUMBER_TYPE$, id_v $tipo$, idcarga $NUMBER_TYPE$, estado $CHAR_TYPE$(1) )
alter table $tablaRel$ add constraint FK_$tablaRel$Cid_p foreign key (id_p) references $tablename$ (ID)
alter table $tablaRel$ add constraint FK_$tablaRel$Cid_v foreign key (id_v) references $llave_foranea$ (ID)
sqlMap.select: Select count(*) from all_tab_columns where COLUMN_NAME = upper(#id_campo#) and TABLE_NAME = upper(#tablename#) and nullable = 'Y'
SELECT count(*) FROM user_constraints WHERE TABLE_NAME = upper(#tablename#) and constraint_name = upper(#constraint#)
sqlMap.update: ALTER TABLE $tablename$ ADD CONSTRAINT uk_pk_$tablename$ UNIQUE $campos$
ALTER TABLE $tablename$ DROP CONSTRAINT uk_pk_$tablename$ CASCADE
$sql$
$sql$
$sql$
